hero_title: Sida AskBiz u Shaqeyso — Si Buuxda
hero_sub_before: Waxaan aaminsanahay inaad u qalanto inaad fahamto AI-ga aad ku qaadanayso go'aannada ganacsiga. Kani waa daahfurkayaga buuxa: modelka aan isticmaalno, sida jawaabaha loo abuuro, heerarkayaga saxsanaanta, hab-raacyadayada, iyo waafaqsanaantayada sharciyada. Markii ugu dambeysay ee la cusboonaysiiyay:
search_placeholder: Ka raadi dukumentiyada daahfurnaanta — tusaale khyaali, kalsooni, modelka macaamiisha ka baxaya…
search_empty_sub_before: Isku day ereyo kala duwan ama
intro_body_sections: qaybood. Waa habka ugu weyn ee aan ku fulinno waajibaadkayaga hoosta EU AI Act Qodobka 13 (daahfurnaanta nidaamyada AI ee khatarta xaddidan), iyo ballanqaadkayaga aan kuu qabno adiga oo isticmaale ah. Maqaal kasta waxaa la dib u eegaa rubuc kasta. Haddii wax halkan ku qoran uu yahay mid aan cad ama aan dhamayn, iimayl u dir
related_rules_desc: Isticmaalka la oggol yahay, hantida garaadka, siyaasadaha AI, dhaqan-gelinta, iyo waafaqsanaanta sharciyada UK, EU, iyo US.
related_security_desc: Sida AskBiz u sireyso oo u ilaaliso xogta ganacsigaaga iyada oo hakad ah iyo iyada oo dhex marta.
related_gdpr_desc: Xuquuqahaaga adiga oo xog-lehaan ah iyo doorka AskBiz ee ah xog-habeeye.
related_responsible_desc: Hagitaanka isticmaalka wax-soo-saarka AI si mas'uuliyad leh, oo ay ku jirto sida loo damiyo barashada AI.
related_report_desc: Sida loo calaamadeeyo daldaloolada amniga, xadgudubka siyaasadda, ama qaladaadka AI.
related_safety_desc: Sida aan uga jawaabno jabinta xogta iyo dhacdooyinka badbaadada barxadda.
contact_title: Su'aalo Ku Saabsan Sida Aan U Shaqeyno?
contact_sub: Haddii wax ku jira Xarunta Daahfurnaantaan uu yahay mid aan cad, aan dhamayn, ama aad aaminsan tahay inuu khaldan yahay, waxaan rabnaa inaan ogaanno. Noo soo iimayl oo waxaan kaaga jawaabi doonnaa 2 maalmood oo shaqo gudahood.
article_footer_reviewed: Maqaalkan waxaa markii ugu dambeysay la dib u eegay
article_footer_inaccurate: Haddii wax aan cad yahay ama aad aaminsan tahay inuu khaldan yahay, iimayl u dir
